rationale: No regression under the DAG/merge-signal lens. Region diffs of bf01a21a vs 631d7c14 show the frontmatter (1→2→3 edges, every key_file_paths set), Bead 1, Bead 3, and the entire Risks/Sequencing section (the §606 110/112 upstream claims and mechanical-rebase analysis verified in round 1) are byte-identical; all 14 hunks fall inside Bead 2/Testing Strategy. The three disjoint doc-sync gates (architecture/interfaces/runbook) survive. Added-line repo paths are only existing surfaces: internal/config appears as the read-only schema reference for the e2e's seeded scratch-config panel: block, which deliberately omits any gates: block — keeping the '111 reads none of 112's surface' boundary intact rather than eroding it. The destructured-identifier binding, dash guard, target grammar, and shim payload pairs are all ms-panel.js/workflow_test.go/e2e-scratch internals introducing no new cross-bead or cross-spec coupling.

findings.title: Delta containment re-verified structurally
findings.detail: diff of the four non-Bead-2 regions between bf01a21a and 631d7c14 returns empty (frontmatter, Bead 1, Bead 3, Risks/Sequencing all byte-identical); doc-sync membership gates present at 3 occurrences. The round-2 fix's e2e config seeding references .mindspec/config.yaml only as the scratch repo's fixture and internal/config only as the schema to match — both already in the plan's consumed-contract surface. No key_file_paths drift, no new tracked files, no new upstream-symbol consumption.
